Interface IUavUasBuilder

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that controls UAV/UAS images.

[Guid("5EDA2317-45EC-4C57-BCFC-4006AC881B61")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IUavUasBuilder

Properties

CameraFile

The file or folder path.

string CameraFile { get; set; }

Property Value

string

The camera properties, such as pixel size, distortion, and etc..
